node.content-desc: You’re ready to trade! Trade with INR directly from your bank. No crypto needed. Welcome Offer: Get ₹500 KYC Completed ₹250 Reward Pay ₹1000 Fees* ₹250 Reward Small lot sizes | Exit anytime | INR settlement *within 7 days of KYC completion Start Trading Now

node.text: Trade with INR directly from your bank.
Small lot sizes | Exit anytime | INR settlement
